harness_id.description: Harness the new session runs on.

from_native_session_id.description: The vendor native session id being left behind (not a Claudexor id); null when none existed.

to_session_id.description: New Claudexor session id; null when no new session was created.

summary.description: Carried-over conversation summary injected into the new session.

reason.description: Typed reason an auto-fallback (route/auth switch) or session re-host happened, driven by typed budget/quota signals and events, never by regex over prose.

SessionReboundLineage.description: The lossy payload serialized when a turn cannot resume the native session in place (isolated candidates or re-hosting onto a different harness); carried by the session.rebound event.
